CRAFTINGTABLE.ModuleLanguageHint: Controls the language of the Crafting Table player interface. Auto follows the Foundry language setting.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.UnsavedDraft: Unsaved draft (not yet created in the world)
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.CompendiumNotice: This recipe comes from a compendium. Duplicate it to create an editable world recipe.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.Name: Name
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ItemPickerEmpty: No Items are available in the world or configured compendiums.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.RulesIntro: Configure what happens on different crafting results.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.FailureRuleHint: Choose what happens when the crafting check fails.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.CustomMacroHint: Runs as the user completing the craft. Players need permission to execute this macro.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.MacroContext: The macro receives actor, token, speaker, recipe, outcomeType, and craftingTable context.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.FailureResultsHint: Items created instead of the normal crafting result when the recipe fails.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ChooseFailureItem: Choose Create Failure Item to configure failure result items.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.DropFailureHelp: Drop items here or click Add Failure Result.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.FlavorFailureHint: Optional narrative text shown to players. It does not change crafting logic.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.FlavorFailurePlaceholde: Optional narrative text shown to players...
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.MissDcHint: Maximum miss that still counts as partial success.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.PrimaryPartialHint: Primary result of the partial success.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.QualityHint: Used when reduced quality is selected.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.AdditionalHelp: Add secondary changes such as extra time, reduced output, or GM notes.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.CriticalSuccessWhen: When this recipe results in a critical success.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.MinimumTotalHint: The total roll must be at least this value.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.CriticalSuccessExamples: Double Output, Bonus Item, Reduce Time, No Gold Cost.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.MaximumTotalHint: The total roll must be at most this value.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.CancelMacroHint: Return false or an object with cancel: true to keep the craft unfinished.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ConsequenceExamples: Failure Item, Tool Destruction, GM Decision, Custom Macro.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Preview.Title: Outcome Preview
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.UnsavedKept: Unsaved changes are kept until you save.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.NoRecipeHelp: Configure a recipe compendium in module settings or create a new recipe.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.NoRecipesHelp: Create a recipe or import recipes from a configured compendium.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ImportExportIntro: Import and export recipes as JSON files, so you can move them between Foundry worlds.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ExportAllJson: Export All World Recipes To JSON
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ImportExportHelp: Import skips recipes already present in world items. Export writes one JSON file containing one or more recipes. Use the recipe list checkboxes to export multiple recipes at once.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.RequestsIntro: Craft approvals and ongoing work currently tracked on player actors.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.InterruptedOperationsHe: Review the actor's inventory, progress, and requests before dismissing an interrupted operation.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.InterruptedReviewed: Interrupted crafting operation marked as reviewed.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.OutcomeQueueHelp: Each entry is a persisted crafting outcome. Resolving it applies the selected mechanical effect and finalizes the related progress and approval together.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.NoPendingOutcomes: No crafting outcomes are waiting for a GM decision.
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ApplyConfiguredOutcome: Apply the effect configured by the recipe
CRAFTINGTABLE.GM.ReturnToPlayer: Return to the player without finalizing
Comma-separated compendium collection IDs containing recipe Items, e.g. world.crafting-recipes,my-module.recipes.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.UseModuleRecipePac: Automatically use recipe packs from enabled modules
Read recipe packs declared by active modules.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.DefaultMode.Name: Default crafting mode
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.UseDnd5ePacks.Name: Use DnD5e item compendiums
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.UseDnd5ePacks.Hint: Search DnD5e Item compendiums when an ingredient or result has no UUID.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.ItemCompendiums.Hi: Comma-separated Item compendium IDs searched for ingredients and results.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.UseModuleItemPacks: Automatically use item packs from enabled modules
Search item packs declared by active modules.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.CustomCategories.H: Internal category list managed from the GM Panel.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.GmPanelLayout.Name: GM Panel layout
CRAFTINGTABLE.Setting.GmPanelLayout.Hint: Controls the GM Panel size and density.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.SelectActor: Select a token or assign a character first.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.OpenFailed: Crafting Table could not open. Check the console for details.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.GmOnly: Only the GM can open the Crafting Table GM Panel.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.OpenGmFailed: Crafting Table GM Panel could not open. Check the console for details.

CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.SelectRecipeEdit: Select a recipe to edit first.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.DuplicateFavorite: Duplicate this compendium recipe before marking it as favorite.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.SelectCategory: Select a category before editing it.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.AddIngredients: Select an editable world recipe before adding ingredients.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.AddResults: Select an editable world recipe before adding results.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.DropReadFailed: Crafting Table could not read the dropped item.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.JsonNoRecipes: The selected JSON file does not contain any Crafting Table recipes.

CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.NoValidExport: No valid recipes were available to export.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.DuplicateEdit: Duplicate this compendium recipe before editing it.

CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.ReferenceFailed: Crafting Table could not create missing item references.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.ReferenceRollbackFa: Recipe save failed and some automatically created item references could not be removed. Check world items.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.SelectDuplicate: Select a recipe to duplicate first.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.WorldDeleteOnly: Only world recipes can be deleted from this panel.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.JsonReadFailed: Crafting Table could not read that JSON file.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.MacroMissing: The configured crafting macro could not be found.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Outcome.Info.NoPenalty: No ingredients are lost. No item is created.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Outcome.Info.LoseAll: All consumed ingredients will be lost. No item is created.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Outcome.Info.LoseHalf: Half of consumed ingredients will be lost. No item is created.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Outcome.Info.CreateFailure: Configured failure result item(s) may be created.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Outcome.Info.GmDecision: The GM decides the result of the failed crafting check.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Outcome.Info.CustomMacro: The selected Foundry macro resolves this failure.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.Later: {label} will be added in a later Crafting Table version.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.FailureItemFirst: Choose Create Failure Item before adding failure result items.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.CategoryRenamed: Renamed category to {category}. Updated world recipes: {count}.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.Exported: Exported recipes to JSON: {count}. Skipped invalid: {invalid}.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.CreatedRecipeDraft: Started recipe draft: {recipe}. It will be created in the world after a valid save.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Dialog.DiscardSwitchRecipe: You have unsaved recipe changes. Switch recipes and discard those changes?
CRAFTINGTABLE.Dialog.DiscardBackToList: Discard unsaved recipe changes and return to the recipe list?
CRAFTINGTABLE.Dialog.DiscardCreateRecipe: Create a new recipe and discard unsaved changes on the current recipe?
CRAFTINGTABLE.Dialog.DiscardClosePanel: Close the GM panel and discard all unsaved recipe changes?
CRAFTINGTABLE.Notify.MacroPermission: You do not have permission to execute the macro: {macro}.

CRAFTINGTABLE.Outcome.Description.MacroC: The selected Foundry macro resolves the critical failure.

CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.InvalidRecipeId: Missing or invalid stable recipe ID.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.ResultQuantity: Result "{name}" quantity must be greater than 0.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.IngredientNoRef: Ingredient "{name}" has no UUID or match mode.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.IngredientUuidM: Ingredient "{name}" uses UUID matching but has no UUID.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.IngredientQuant: Ingredient "{name}" quantity must be greater than 0.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.OutcomeQuantity: {scope} result "{name}" quantity must be greater than 0.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.OutcomeChance: {scope} result "{name}" chance must be between 0 and 100.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.PartialRange: Partial Success miss range must be greater than 0.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.CriticalSuccess: Critical Success custom trigger requires a numeric minimum total.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.CriticalFailure: Critical Failure custom trigger requires a numeric maximum total.
CRAFTINGTABLE.Validation.MacroRequired: {scope} Custom Macro requires a selected macro.
